# Third-Party Notice: DanmakuFlameMaster (DFM)

- Name: DanmakuFlameMaster
- Coordinates: `com.github.bilibili:DanmakuFlameMaster:0.9.25`
- License: Apache License 2.0
- Source: https://github.com/bilibili/DanmakuFlameMaster

This application includes the DanmakuFlameMaster library distributed under the Apache-2.0 license. A copy of the license is provided in the library repository. Attribution is included per license requirements.

## Deferred Online Sources (Out of Scope for Phase 1)

Phase 1 restricts danmaku sources to same-basename local files (e.g., `movie.mp4` + `movie.xml`). Online sources and plugins are explicitly deferred. Hook points for future integration exist in the Android controller/manager layer to support additional source providers without impacting the core player or non-Android platforms.
